CVE-2020-27347.title: In tmux before version 3.1c the function input_csi_dispatch_sgr_c ...
CVE-2020-27347.summary: In tmux before version 3.1c the function input_csi_dispatch_sgr_colon() in file input.c contained a stack-based buffer-overflow that can be exploited by terminal output.
